title: Educational AI Pedagogy
abstract: We present a framework for extracting culturally-adaptive teaching patterns from 127,000+ cross-cultural educational dialogues generated by the Lucineer educational AI platform. Using 15 base synthesis methods (Socratic, Dialectical, Analogical, Constructivist, Inquiry-based, Problem-based, Experiential, Collaborative, Direct, Scaffolding, Metacognitive, Flipped, Gamified, Narrative, Visual) and 12 combination tiles, we identify: (1) culture-method effectiveness correlations,
comments: 25 pages, 10 figures, submitted to arXiv on 2026-03-15
